title: Sorcerer Spell List
excerpt: The full list of spells available to the Sorcerer class.
markdown:
# Sorcerer Spell List
This section presents the Sorcerer spell list. The spells are organized by spell level and then alphabetized, and each spell's school of magic is listed. In the Special column, C means the spell requires Concentration, R means it's a Ritual, and M means it requires a specific Material component.

### Cantrips (Level 0 Sorcerer Spells)
| Spell                                                                                               | School          | Special |
|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------|---------|
| [[acid-splash|Acid Splash]]           | Evocation       | -       |
| [[blade-ward|Blade Ward]]             | Abjuration      | C       |
| [[chill-touch|Chill Touch]]           | Necromancy      | -       |
| [[dancing-lights|Dancing Lights]]       | Illusion        | C       |
| [[elementalism]]         | Transmutation   | -       |
| [[fire-bolt|Fire Bolt]]             | Evocation       | -       |
| [[friends]]                 | Enchantment     | C       |
| [[light]]                   | Evocation       | -       |
| [[mage-hand|Mage Hand]]             | Conjuration     | -       |
| [[mending]]                 | Transmutation   | -       |
| [[message]]                 | Transmutation   | -       |
| [[mind-sliver|Mind Sliver]]           | Enchantment     | -       |
| [[minor-illusion|Minor Illusion]]       | Illusion        | -       |
| [[poison-spray|Poison Spray]]         | Necromancy      | -       |
| [[prestidigitation]]     | Transmutation   | -       |
| [[ray-of-frost|Ray of Frost]]         | Evocation       | -       |
| [[shocking-grasp|Shocking Grasp]]       | Evocation       | -       |
| Sorcerous Burst      | Evocation       | -       |
| [[thunderclap]]            | Evocation       | -       |
| [[true-strike|True Strike]]           | Divination      | -       |
